title: Loomwright Launches Workflow Templates for Solo Founders
summary: A new template library packages Loomwright's most common automations for single-founder teams.

title: Loomwright Named a 2026 Rising Tools Vendor
summary: Loomwright made a community-voted list of rising workflow-automation vendors for the year.

title: Loomwright Opens Its First Dedicated GTM Engineering Track
summary: The company is building out a founding go-to-market engineering function for the first time.
